name: Year C — Jan 19, 2025 (Sun)

readings.citation:
All the earth shall bow down before you, O God,
and shall sing to you, shall sing to your name, O Most High!

antiphons.citation: Verse before the Gospel | See 2 Thes 2:14
antiphons.text:
God has called us through the Gospel
to possess the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option I | Cf. Ps 23 (22):5
antiphons.text:
You have prepared a table before me,
and how precious is the chalice that quenches my thirst.

planningNotes:
We have come to know and to believe
in the love that God has for us.
